title: 11 Herbal Teas For Nasal Congestion
description: Eucalyptus globulus teas contains compounds like eucalyptol, a natural decongestant that helps ease nasal congestion by thinning mucus and making it easier to expel. This process allows for better breathing and relief from stuffiness. Eucalyptol, along with other constituents like flavonoids and tannins, also has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce swelling in the nasal passages and sinuses, further alleviating congestion.
